title: Unauthorized UAS Loitering Over Newark Liberty Runway 22L
summary: A DJI-type quadcopter was observed conducting repeated passes over the approach corridor of Runway 22L at Newark Liberty International Airport, forcing ATC to issue ground stop for 18 minutes.

title: Surveillance Drone Spotted Circling JBLM Perimeter at Night
summary: A fixed-wing UAS with ISR-configured payload was observed making multiple circumferential passes around the Joint Base Lewis-McChord main installation perimeter between 0200-0330 local. No FAA registration ID broadcast detected.

title: Drone Detected Near Port of Los Angeles Container Terminal
summary: Harbor patrol reported an unregistered quadcopter conducting low-altitude passes over APM Terminals at Berth 400. Drone appeared to be photographing vessel manifests and container stacking areas.
location_name: Port of Los Angeles — APM Terminal

title: Contraband Drone Smuggling Attempt at Pelican Bay SHU
summary: Security staff at Pelican Bay State Prison recovered a DJI Mini 3 Pro that crash-landed inside the SHU yard after what appeared to be a contraband delivery attempt. Payload included a cellphone, drugs, and a tobacco pouch.

title: UAS Observed Near Georgia Nuclear Assembly Plant
summary: A slow-moving multi-rotor drone was observed by plant security performing multiple figure-eight passes approximately 400 meters from the Georgia Nuclear Assembly Plant facility boundary. Plant security contacted local sheriff; drone departed before responders arrived.

title: Drone Disrupts Game Operations at Fenway Park
summary: During a Red Sox home game, a small quadcopter entered restricted airspace over Fenway Park during the 7th inning stretch, triggering a brief public address announcement. FAA 30-nautical-mile TFR was in effect. Drone operator not identified.

title: Multi-Drone ISR Operation Observed on Texas-Mexico Border Near Laredo
summary: CBP air and marine operations detected three coordinated quadcopters conducting staggered surveillance passes along the Rio Grande near Laredo International Bridge. Pattern consistent with cartel reconnaissance of CBP checkpoint schedules.

title: Unauthorized Drone Flight Over US Capitol Restricted Airspace
summary: USCP and Secret Service responded after a commercial quadcopter entered the P-56 restricted airspace directly over the US Capitol dome. Drone was recovered on Capitol grounds; operator cited under 49 U.S.C. 46307.

title: Persistent Drone Surveillance Observed at MacDill AFB
summary: Base security reported a fixed-wing UAS conducting repeated northwest-to-southeast passes parallel to the MacDill AFB flight line over a 45-minute window. Aircraft operated without navigation lights. AFSFC was notified.

title: Near-Miss Event Between Drone and Commercial Aircraft at JFK Approach
summary: A United Airlines B737-900 on final approach to JFK Runway 13R reported a drone passing within 200 feet at approximately 1,200 feet AGL over Jamaica Bay. FAA ASRS report filed by flight crew.

title: Drone Spotted Over Hoover Dam Restricted Zone
summary: National Park Service rangers and Bureau of Reclamation security reported an unregistered quadcopter conducting low passes over the Hoover Dam intake towers. Drone recovered after landing on the dam road.

title: Weaponized Drone Attack on Power Substation — Pennsylvania
summary: A homemade fixed-wing drone carrying incendiary material was flown into a 138 kV transformer at a rural Pennsylvania substation, causing a fire and 6-hour power outage affecting 4,200 customers. FBI Joint Terrorism Task Force investigating.

title: Drone Captures Aerial Footage of SpaceX Boca Chica Facility
summary: Local resident reported a quadcopter hovering near the SpaceX Starship integration tower and launch pad area at Boca Chica, TX. Footage later appeared on social media. FAA contacted SpaceX security.

title: Prison Drone Drop at Rikers Island Facility
summary: A drone was intercepted by Rikers Island security staff attempting to drop a payload package into the adolescent facility yard. Package contained cellphones, SIM cards, and methamphetamine. NYPD Aviation Unit responded.

title: Drone-Based RF Jamming Near Chicago O'Hare Airport
summary: Air Traffic Control at O'Hare reported GPS signal anomalies affecting aircraft on the DUPAGE arrival corridor consistent with drone-based jamming from Elk Grove Village. FAA Security and CISA were notified.

title: Residential Privacy Violation by Commercial Drone in Phoenix Suburb
summary: Three residents of a Scottsdale, AZ gated community filed police reports after a commercial drone operated by an unknown party filmed private pools and yards over multiple days. Scottsdale PD opened investigation.

title: Drone Observed Near Hanford Nuclear Site Restricted Zone
summary: DOE security personnel detected a slow-moving multi-rotor UAS flying along the eastern perimeter road of the Hanford Site near the 200 Area tank farms. Drone was tracked for 12 minutes before losing visual.

title: Drone Collision with Helicopter Near Denver Helipad
summary: A Life Flight helicopter on approach to Rocky Mountain Hospital Denver reported a DJI Phantom-type drone collision striking the main rotor system. Aircraft landed safely; FAA FSDO opened accident investigation.

title: UAS Sighting at Houston Ship Channel LNG Terminal
summary: Freeport LNG terminal security observed a quadcopter conducting low passes over the liquefaction train area at 0645 local. No remote ID signal detected. CISA and Coast Guard Sector Houston-Galveston notified.

title: Drone Swarm Disrupts NASCAR Event at Talladega Superspeedway
summary: Five coordinated quadcopters entered restricted airspace over Talladega Superspeedway during the GEICO 500, forcing a brief race caution. FAA emergency TFR enforcement was activated. No injuries.

title: Drone Attack on Arizona Power Grid Substation
summary: A quadcopter carrying copper wire was deliberately flown into 69 kV switching equipment at a SRP substation in the East Valley, causing a phase-to-phase fault and 90-minute outage for 14,000 customers. FBI and CISA on scene.

title: Drone Spotted Over Seattle Water Treatment Facility
summary: SPU security staff observed a quad-rotor drone making multiple low passes over the Cedar River Watershed Treatment Facility near Renton. Drone appeared to be mapping settling basin infrastructure.

title: Unidentified UAS Observed Near I-80 Weigh Station — Nebraska
summary: Nebraska State Patrol trooper reported a slow-moving quadcopter hovering over the eastbound I-80 commercial vehicle inspection station near Grand Island. Drone was observed for approximately 8 minutes before departing westbound.
location_name: I-80 Eastbound Weigh Station — Grand Island

title: Drone Harassment of Law Enforcement Convoy in Memphis
summary: An MPD tactical unit reported a commercial drone following their armored convoy for approximately 2 miles through downtown Memphis before being lost in urban clutter. No hostile payload observed but behavior flagged as reconnaissance.

title: Weaponized Drone Detonation Near Miami Beach Event Security Zone
summary: Local news reported a modified DJI quadcopter loaded with pyrotechnic material detonated approximately 50 meters from a VIP event perimeter on Miami Beach. Two security personnel sustained minor injuries. FDLE and DHS investigating.
location_name: Miami Beach — South Pointe Event Zone
